reviews.author: Guest Traveler 1
reviews.title: Fantastic value
reviews.body: The ship was clean and well maintained. Wi-Fi was a bit slow in remote areas, but overall a great value cruise. Slipped off to 30-Night Southern Africa Coastal Voyage and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 2
reviews.title: Unbelievable Cruise!
reviews.body: Absolutely loved the balcony cabin and the service was top notch! The excursions in ports of call were well organized. Slipped off to 30-Night Southern Africa Coastal Voyage and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 3
reviews.title: Unbelievable Cruise!
reviews.body: Dining options were amazing. Specialty restaurants were worth the cover charge. The theater shows were Broadway quality. Slipped off to 30-Night Southern Africa Coastal Voyage and had a fantastic time.

seo.title: 30-Night Southern Africa Coastal Voyage | Symphony of the Seas | Royal Caribbean International
seo.metaDescription: Book a 30-night Africa cruise onboard Symphony of the Seas of Royal Caribbean International. Visiting Cape Town, Walvis Bay (Namibia), Lüderitz (Namibia). Standard & luxury cabins available. Get a quote today.
